Sign In

Overview
Submitter & Approver
Admin
Help Document
Welcome to Zoho Expense
Need help with understanding a feature or using Zoho Expense? Read our help document to learn about our features and find user-friendly instructions to perform functions easily.
What’s your role?
Access help documents based on the user role that has been assigned to you in Zoho Expense.
Admin
In the Admin help document, you can learn how to set up your organization, invite users, assign user roles, configure the product preferences, and so on.
View Help
Approver
Learn how to approve or reject the records submitted for approval. Also, when you're out of office, get to know how to appoint approvers to act on your behalf.
View Help
Submitter
Access the submitters' help doc if you want to learn how to record your expenses, submit expense reports, request advances, create travel requests, and so on.
View Help
I need help with
Getting Started with Zoho Expense
Learn how Zoho Expense works, the onboarding process, and the system requirements to get started with reporting your expenses.
Corporate Cards
Setting Up your Organization
Billing and Subscription
Reporting Expenses

View all

Expense management 101: A practical guide for modern businesses
Expense management is everyone’s job and almost nobody’s favorite. If you lead finance, you see the ripple effects most clearly: month-end…
15 mins read
Optimize business travel & control spend effectively with managed travel programs
Most businesses today handle travel through fragmented, unmanaged approaches—employees booking independently via consumer sites,…

Anti-spam Policy
Terms of Service
Privacy Policy
Trademark Policy
Cookie Policy
GDPR Compliance
Abuse Policy
© 2026, Zoho Corporation Pvt. Ltd. All Rights Reserved.
At Zoho, we do not use third-party software to track
                    website visitors. We take
                    your privacy seriously and use our own tools hosted in our data centres. Your data is yours, and we
                    never monetize it for advertisement purposes. You can learn more about our cookie policy
here
and
                    change your preferences at any time.
Manage
                            Cookies
Accept All Cookies
Reject Unnecessary
                            Cookies
close
Cookie Settings
The options below allow you to manage your consent for the cookies that are set on this website. You
                    can manage your preference anytime by visiting our
cookie
                        policy
or by clicking on the cookie icon at the bottom-left corner of the webpage.
Strictly Necessary
They are necessary for our website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
                                They are essential in order to enable you to navigate around the website and use its
                                features. If you remove or disable these cookies from your browser, we cannot guarantee
                                that you will be able to use our websites.
Learn
                                More
Functional/Preference
They allow us to remember the choices made by you (such as your user name, language or
                                region) as well as other functionalities (such as controlling the cookie banner,
                                redirection to a new page) in order to provide a more personalised online experience.
                                These preferences are remembered (through the use of persistent cookies) so that you
                                need not set them again the next time you visit the page.
Note : The
live chat
widget will
not
work if the
                                functionality/preference setting is disabled.
Learn
                                More
Analytics
They help us improve the way our websites work (e.g. by ensuring that users are finding
                                what they are looking for easily). These collect aggregate information about visits,
                                navigations in the websites so that we can make improvement and report our performance.
                                Analytics cookies may also be used to test new pages or features to understand how users
                                adopt them.
Learn
                                More
Third-party company cookies
When you visit some of our webpages that contain embedded content hosted on a third party
                                platform such as YouTube videos, these third parties set cookies on your browser. We
                                always opt for the most privacy friendly options provided by these parties, however
                                these are not controlled by us. If you do not want these parties to set cookies on your
                                browser on visiting our site, you should avoid visiting webpages that contain such
                                embeds.
Learn
                                More
Save & Exit
We're Online!
How may I help you today?

analysis.name: Zoho Expense
analysis.value_proposition: Travel and expense (T&E) management platform for streamlined expense reporting, approvals, and reimbursements.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing businesses and finance teams needing to manage employee expenses, travel requests, and corporate cards within the broader Zoho ecosystem

features.name: expense reporting
features.description: Record expenses and submit expense reports for approval
features.evidence_quote: if you want to learn how to record your expenses, submit expense reports

features.name: receipt scanning (ocr)
features.description: Auto-scan receipts to extract expense data (autoscan)
features.evidence_quote: Does Zoho Expense read receipts in all languages?

features.name: multi-receipt attachment
features.description: Attach multiple receipts to a single expense
features.evidence_quote: Can I attach multiple receipts to an expense?

features.name: travel requests
features.description: Employees can create travel requests for pre-approval
features.evidence_quote: create travel requests

features.description: Request advances against upcoming expenses

features.evidence_quote: how to approve or reject the records submitted for approval

features.evidence_quote: Monday - Friday United States +1 8445571787

features.description: Extension gallery for extending functionality

differentiators: Deep integration across the Zoho ecosystem (Books, People, Payroll, Procurement, CRM)
First-party data privacy: no third-party website trackers, data hosted in Zoho's own data centers
Part of Zoho One unified suite for all-in-one business software

praised: Part of a broad affordable Zoho ecosystem (implied from HN: 'Zoho on Salesforce (Openness wins)')
